author: Eamonn Dillon
title: Set of the Week: Cooley's Set
body: From Foinn Seisiún Book I (page 11) — a classic reel set. Cooley's is the anchor, one of the most-played reels in the tradition. The Wise Maid flows beautifully out of it in D, then Bird in the Bush lifts it into G. Start slow and get the ornaments tight on Cooley's B part before speeding up.

author: Eamonn Dillon
title: Set of the Week: Drowsy Maggie Set
body: From Foinn Seisiún Book I (page 13) — Drowsy Maggie is one everyone should know. Kicks off in E dorian with loads of energy, then The Glass of Beer settles into D, and Toss the Feathers drives it home. Three reels, three different feels. The Em→D→D key progression keeps things flowing.

author: Eamonn Dillon
title: Set of the Week: Salamanca Set
body: From Foinn Seisiún Book I (page 15) — the Bothy Band made this set famous. Salamanca is a powerhouse in D, The Banshee lifts into G, and Sailor's Bonnet brings it back. If you only learn one reel set this month, make it this one.
